name: Piano
description: A local-first piano song library with 88-key playback and falling-note practice visualization.
author: Moldable Team

capabilities.name: Piano songs
capabilities.description: Read and import Piano song data in the active workspace.

scopes.name: List songs
scopes.description: List installed Piano songs with summary metadata.

scopes.name: Get song
scopes.description: Read one complete Piano song JSON document, including notes and tempo/meter maps.

scopes.name: Get song sound settings
scopes.description: Get a song's suggested/default sound, user override, and effective sound choice.

scopes.name: Set song sound settings
scopes.description: Set or clear a song's suggested/default sound and user override sound choice.

scopes.name: Import MIDI file
scopes.description: Import an existing local .mid or .midi file as a deterministic Piano song JSON document.

filePath.description: Absolute local path to an existing .mid or .midi file.

songId.description: Optional deterministic song id. Defaults to a slug of the MIDI filename.

title.description: Optional display title. Defaults to the MIDI filename.

folderId.description: Optional folder id to assign the imported song to.

folderName.description: Optional existing folder name to assign the imported song to.

createFolder.description: Create folderName if it does not already exist. Defaults to false.

replaceSongId.description: Optional previous song id to remove after importing.

overwrite.description: Allow replacing an existing song with the same songId.

scopes.name: Create or replace song
scopes.description: Create or replace a complete Piano song JSON document and optionally place it in a folder. Use this for chat-created lessons and manual song/note edits instead of writing files directly.

song.description: Complete PianoSong object with id, title, tempo/meter fields, and notes.

folderId.description: Optional existing folder id to assign the song to.

folderName.description: Optional existing folder name to assign the song to.

createFolder.description: Create folderName if it does not already exist. Defaults to false.

overwrite.description: Allow replacing an existing song with the same id.

allowEmpty.description: Allow creating a temporary song shell with zero notes. Useful before songs.patch appends notes in chunks.

soundSettings.description: Optional suggested/override sound settings for the song.

scopes.name: Create or replace song from JSON file
scopes.description: Read a local JSON file containing either a complete PianoSong object or a { song, ...options } envelope, validate it, persist it as a Piano song, and optionally place it in a folder. Use this for large chat-generated songs to avoid sending thousands of notes through RPC payloads.

filePath.description: Absolute local path to a .json file containing a PianoSong or { song, ...options } envelope.

folderId.description: Optional existing folder id to assign the song to. Overrides the file envelope.

folderName.description: Optional existing folder name to assign the song to. Overrides the file envelope.

createFolder.description: Create folderName if it does not already exist. Overrides the file envelope.

overwrite.description: Allow replacing an existing song with the same id. Overrides the file envelope.

allowEmpty.description: Allow creating a song shell with zero notes. Overrides the file envelope.

soundSettings.description: Optional suggested/override sound settings. Overrides the file envelope.

scopes.name: Patch song notes
scopes.description: Apply surgical note operations to an existing song: append notes, replace all notes, upsert notes by id, delete notes by id/time range, or replace a time range. Use this for piece-by-piece manual song creation/editing without resending the full song.

metadata.description: Optional partial song metadata to merge before saving.

noteOperations.description: Operations such as { type: 'append', notes }, { type: 'replaceAll', notes }, { type: 'upsert', notes }, { type: 'delete', ids/start/end }, or { type: 'replaceRange', start, end, notes }.

sortNotes.description: Sort notes by start/midi/id after applying operations. Defaults to true.

allowEmpty.description: Allow the patched song to temporarily have zero notes.

folderId.description: Optional existing folder id to assign the song to.

folderName.description: Optional existing folder name to assign the song to.

createFolder.description: Create folderName if it does not already exist. Defaults to false.

soundSettings.description: Optional suggested/override sound settings for the song.

scopes.name: Patch song from JSON file
scopes.description: Read a local JSON file containing a songs.patch request or an array of note operations, apply it, and persist once. Use this for large surgical edits so chat can write/pipeline a patch file instead of embedding huge note arrays in the RPC call.

filePath.description: Absolute local path to a .json file containing { songId, metadata, noteOperations, ...options } or an array of note operations.

songId.description: Target song id. Required when the file contains only an operations array. Overrides songId in the file envelope.

sortNotes.description: Sort notes by start/midi/id after applying operations. Overrides the file envelope.

allowEmpty.description: Allow the patched song to temporarily have zero notes. Overrides the file envelope.

folderId.description: Optional existing folder id to assign the song to. Overrides the file envelope.

folderName.description: Optional existing folder name to assign the song to. Overrides the file envelope.

createFolder.description: Create folderName if it does not already exist. Overrides the file envelope.

soundSettings.description: Optional suggested/override sound settings. Overrides the file envelope.

scopes.name: Read library revision
scopes.description: Read a lightweight revision token for song, folder, and song sound data so clients can refresh after external changes.

capabilities.name: Piano folders
capabilities.description: Read Piano library folders in the active workspace.

scopes.name: List folders
scopes.description: List Piano song folders and their song IDs.

tagline: Practice piano with falling notes and a full 88-key library
